items.title: The most trusted code on Earth is being rewritten in Rust
items.author: Fireship
items.content:
<article>Junie is the #1 coding agent on SWE-Rebench and it'll save you a bunch of tokens - https://jb.gg/Fireship-Junie-GA

Use code: FIRESHIP20 to to get 20 free AI credits

SQLite, the world's most trusted code, just got rewritten in Rust and it actually works. It's called Turso and it ships some cool features you won't find in SQLite.

items.title: I read every major CS paper of the last 100 years...
items.author: Fireship
items.content:
<article>Coder lets you self-host your coding agents with enterprise-grade security - https://fandf.co/4tZvtU5

These 10 mind-blowing computer science papers made everything in modern computing possible. In today's video, we'll take a look at how they changed the world for better or worse. 

#coding #programming #computerscience #computer 

🔖 Topics Covered

- On Computable Numbers, with an Application to the Entscheidungsproblem, Alan Turing 1936
- A Mathematical Theory of Communication, Claude Shannon 1948
- The Perceptron, Rosenblatt 1958 
- Perceptrons, Marvin Minsky and Seymour Papert 1969 
- Time, Clocks, and the Ordering of Events in a Distributed System, Leslie Lamport 1978
- Learning representations by back-propagating errors, Rumelhart, Hinton, Williams 1986 
- The Anatomy of a Large-Scale Hypertextual Web Search Engine, Sergey Brin and Larry Page 1998 
- ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks, Krizhevsky, Sutskever, Hinton 2012 
- Attention Is All You Need, Vaswani, Google 2017 
- Language Models are Few-Shot Learners, Brown, OpenAI 2020

Want more Fireship?

🗞️ Newsletter: https://bytes.dev
🧠 Courses: https://fireship.dev</article>
